case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. VS. CHRISTOPHER MADORE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MADORE, CHRISTOPHER AKA CHRIS
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MADORE, CHRISTOPHER AKA CHRIS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. SERVED OCT-27-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MADORE, CHRISTOPHER AKA CHRIS
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. SERVED OCT-27-2001, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MADORE, CHRISTOPHER AKA CHRIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1169 MARKET STREET, NO. 209, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MADORE, CHRISTOPHER AKA CHRIS
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $41.66 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.
WRIT OF POSSESSION RETURNED FULLY SATISFIED
